description: Navigate to the VA Drug Class global ^PS(50.605) in the VistA database using the YDBGui web interface. Create a text file report at /home/ga/Documents/drug_class_audit.txt listing at least 5 distinct drug classifications found in the format 'Code: [CODE] - Description: [DESCRIPTION]'. The report must include at least one classification code starting with 'CN' (Central Nervous System) or 'CV' (Cardiovascular).
